channel.title: Insights — Merge Combinator
channel.description: Perspectives on defense innovation, operator-driven development, and the future of national security technology.

item.title: Inside JIATF 401: The Pentagon's New Counter-Drone Marketplace
item.description: The Pentagon is building an app store for counter-drone solutions. JIATF 401 replaces the Joint Counter-small UAS Office with a streamlined approach — including an online marketplace for vetted systems and a common C2 framework targeted within 90 days.

item.title: 9 Months Under Fire: Combat Lessons from the USS Eisenhower
item.description: 770+ weapons expended, multiple combat firsts, and critical insights for defense tech companies from the most intense carrier deployment since WWII.

item.title: FY26 NDAA Decoded: What the SPEED Act Means for Your Defense Startup
item.description: The SPEED Act promises faster procurement. What is actually changing, implementation challenges ahead, and what defense tech companies should do now.
